creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

in the late boot phase (after loading graphics etc..) i do get one line with "devmatch: devinfo_init: Invaild arguement".

I would like to know what this means, i have searched before but have not found anything. At first glance it looks for me like an wrong command argument somewhere.

A screenshot have been attached since its not logged in messages.
